name: Crimean Khanate
note: Last surviving Mongol successor state on the Pontic steppe; Ottoman vassal from 1475. Conducted slave raids into Ukraine, Poland, and Russia — the Crimean slave trade depopulated vast areas of Eastern Europe. Peter the Great and Catherine the Great progressively curtailed Crimean power; annexed by Russia in 1783.

figures.name: Mengli Giray
figures.significance: First fully independent Khan; entered Ottoman vassalage; defeated the Grand Duchy of Lithuania and sacked Kyiv

figures.name: Devlet I Giray
figures.significance: Sacked Moscow in 1571 — the last time a nomadic force sacked the Russian capital; demanded tribute from Ivan the Terrible
